text.title: Spec Requirements Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Spec Requirements.

example.scenario: A spec for a billing-portal v1 carries 14 FRs and 6 NFRs: FR-1 'system displays invoice list' (must, integration test); NFR-1 'p95 list-render < 200ms' (must, perf test); 0 vague tokens detected; trace matrix shows all 20 requirements present in impl-plan and test-plan.
example.trace: r1-numbered-stable → r3-verification-method → r5-no-vague-language → r6-traceability → artefact green
